name: Binghamton Tennis Center
description: Binghamton Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Binghamton, NY. There is 1 indoor clay court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, food, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Bulldogs Sports Complex
description: Bulldogs Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Johnson City, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. name: Glendale Park Tennis Courts
description: Glendale Park Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Endicott, NY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

description: Grippen Park is a place to play pickleball in Endicott, NY. There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
